## Summary

Describe the change and its motivation.

## Change classification

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Presentation/dashboard only
- [ ] Data revision
- [ ] ABM rule or parameter revision
- [ ] LLM prompt/schema/model revision
- [ ] Validation/test revision

## Reproducibility impact

State whether outputs are expected to change and identify the required new version or release.

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_data_package.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_results.py`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] No secrets or private identifiers committed
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated
